summary: Backfilled the canonical ADR 0340 live-apply receipt referenced by `versions/stack.yaml` after the latest `origin/main` integration exposed that the completion commit `591eb347cfda43a4e2ae8d26499211df9536d7b5` had marked the Coolify apps VM separation live on repository version `0.177.153` and platform version `0.130.96` without committing the matching receipt file.

verification.check: Canonical platform truth records the apps VM cutover
verification.observed: `versions/stack.yaml` records `coolify-apps-lv3` as the apps runtime, `apps_migration_status: migrated_via_db`, `nginx_edge_updated: true`, and `repo_smoke_public_http_verified: true`, matching the final ADR 0340 completion state.

verification.check: NGINX and service inventory now point apps traffic at 10.10.10.71
verification.observed: `inventory/group_vars/platform.yml` updates the production and staging `coolify_apps` publication contract to `http://10.10.10.71:80`, so the edge now terminates TLS and forwards `*.apps.lv3.org` traffic to the dedicated apps VM.

verification.check: Coolify migration automation preserves direct-DB migrated apps
verification.observed: `scripts/coolify_tool.py` accepts either `to_dest` or `to_uuid` in the migration fallback path, preserving already-migrated application records instead of failing when the API omits one form.

verification.check: ADR and workstream metadata agree on live completion
verification.observed: `docs/adr/0340-dedicated-coolify-apps-vm-separation.md` marks ADR 0340 implemented in repo `0.177.153` and platform `0.130.96`, `workstreams.yaml` keeps `ws-0340-implementation` live-applied on main, and the reconstructed evidence bundle is preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0340-mainline-receipt-backfill-r1-0.177.153.txt`.

notes: This receipt closes the evidence gap discovered while integrating ADR 0289 from the latest `origin/main`: the repo already claimed ADR 0340 had been live applied, but the canonical receipt file referenced by `versions/stack.yaml` was missing.
The receipt preserves the mainline truth introduced by commit `591eb347cfda43a4e2ae8d26499211df9536d7b5` instead of downgrading `coolify_apps` back to an older unrelated receipt.

correction_loop.surface: Canonical live-apply receipt registration for ADR 0340
correction_loop.repair_action: Added the missing `2026-04-03-adr-0340-coolify-apps-vm-separation-live-apply` receipt file during the latest-main integration so `versions/stack.yaml` can reference the actual ws-0340 completion without breaking repository data-model validation.
